topics.description: Tables for layout (email clients don't support flexbox/grid well).

topics.label: Inline Styles
topics.description: CSS must be inline — most clients strip <style> tags.

topics.description: Litmus, Email on Acid for cross-client rendering preview.

topics.description: @media queries that work in supported clients. Fluid layouts.
